'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 102''' is the one hundred second issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[December 10]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Caamas Document]]
*[[Nexu/Legends|Nexu]]
*[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
*[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]
*[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]]
*[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]-[[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]
*[[Endor/Legends|Endor]]-Forests
*[[CLE-004 window cleaning droid/Legends|CLE-004]] and [[INS-444 window installation droid|INS-444]]
*[[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi field equipment]]
